headline: UBS Maintains Neutral on Molina Healthcare, Raises Price Target to $151
summary: UBS  analyst A.J. Rice   maintains Molina Healthcare (NYSE:MOH) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $145 to $151.

headline: Mizuho Maintains Outperform on Molina Healthcare, Lowers Price Target to $180
summary: Mizuho  analyst Ann Hynes   maintains Molina Healthcare (NYSE:MOH) with a Outperform and lowers the price target from $220 to $180.
